decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 5/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 9 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 133/3503 lines reworked (3.8%, 16/50). 0/35 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 8.3% (2/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 41. Session 8: 44 (process:20 efficiency:20 ttfw:4). Session 9: 52 (process:20 efficiency:21 ttfw:11). Session 10: 54 (process:20 efficiency:24 ttfw:10). Session 11: 29 (process:20 efficiency:7 ttfw:2). Session 12: 26 (process:20 efficiency:5 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 229/229 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
